title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 26 2024
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Bulker values remain stable this week, with a decline observed for older tonnage Supramaxes
Panamax BC (Geared) Tristar Dugon (79,000 DWT, Feb 2011, COSCO Dalian) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 14.75 mil, VV Value USD 14.87 mil
Supramax BC Mystras (57,400 DWT, Jan 2013, STX Dalian) sold to Vosco for USD 17.2 mil, VV Value USD 17.5 mil
Handy BC Wellpark (37,400 DWT, Jun 2014, Oshima) sold SS/DD Passed to undisclosed buyers for 19 mil, VV Value USD 18.69 mil
Tankers: Newbuild Tanker values softening last week with stability remaining elsewhere
MR1 (Chemical/Product) Sunflyte (37,200 DWT, Dec 2001, Hyundai Mipo) sold DD Due to undisclosed buyers for 11.5 mil, VV Value USD 11.90 mil
Containers: Recent sales are pushing up the values of older tonnage for Handy, Sub Panamax and Post Panamax vessels this week, stability remains across the rest of the sector
Sub Panamax BF Tiger (2,824 TEU, Hyundai Mipo, 2006) sold to MSC for USD 19.3 mil, VV Value USD 18.7 mil
Image reference: assets/2024-11-26_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-26-2024_img1_26112024_eddb1c3f2269.jpg
